Bash(mongosh --eval "db.runCommand\({ping:1}\)" --quiet 2>/dev/null || mongo --eval "db.runCommand\({ping:1}\)" --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo "MongoDB status check failed")

Bash(node -e "require\('mongodb'\).MongoClient.connect\('mongodb://localhost:27017/quanli_booking'\).then\(c => { console.log\('MongoDB connected'\); c.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('MongoDB error:', e.message\)\)" 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/health | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); console.log\(d\);" && curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/foods?limit=3" | node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\);console.log\('Foods count:', d.data?.foods?.length, '| Total:', d.data?.pagination?.total\);}\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/health && echo "" && curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/foods?limit=3" 2>&1 | node -p "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); JSON.stringify\({foodsCount: d.data?.foods?.length, total: d.data?.pagination?.total}\)")
